title: Avoid Usage of Wildcard Imports
description: Wildcard imports can make the code look cleaner as they reduce the number of lines in the import section. However, they complicate code maintenance. Import only the specific classes or modules you need. Note that this rule doesn't apply to static imports.
recommendation: Replace wildcard imports with specific class or module imports.
impact: Improves code maintainability and readability by encouraging specific imports over wildcard imports.
